top_signals.title: Donald Trump invokes US senator’s death to push crypto bill
top_signals.summary: With the death of Senator Lindsey Graham and another senator hospitalized, Republicans’ current majority in the chamber has been reduced to 51-47, likely requiring more Democratic support to pass crypto market structure.
